title: Input
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Input wrapper composed from the local Base UI Input primitive and shadcn class tokens.

registry.reason: shadcn Input composes the local Base UI Input primitive.
Input badge examples compose the local shadcn Badge item.
Input inline and button-group examples compose the local shadcn Button item.
Input button-group examples compose the local shadcn Button Group item.
Input field, field-group, inline, grid, required, badge, and group examples compose the local shadcn Field item.
Input group examples compose the local shadcn Input Group item.
shadcn Input uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper.
Provided by the local Base UI Input dependency for Effect Schema options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Input implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: InputDisabled
examples.snippet:
export const InputDisabled = (): Html =>
  input({
    id: 'input-demo-disabled',
    disabled: true,
    type: 'email',
    placeholder: 'Email',
  })

deviations.summary: The full form example with country select is deferred from the installable Input item.
deviations.rationale: The Input item now covers the dependency-complete input, field, group, inline, grid, required, badge, input-group, and button-group examples. The full form crosses into Select-owned state and form orchestration better covered by the Field/Form components.
